Updating this file (path: .github/triggers/refresh-prices.txt) re-runs the
Refresh Prices workflow on demand. The contents don't matter — only the
fact that the file changed. Replace with the current ISO timestamp.

start_index defaults to 0 on this trigger; use workflow_dispatch with
inputs.start_index if you need to resume partway.

Last triggered: 2026-05-02T08:30:00Z (post-public-flip — unlimited GHA budget)
